prompts.name: Two Subjects
prompts.text: Compose a scene with two subjects clearly separated, visually balanced, and interacting naturally without merging anatomy.

prompts.name: Three Subjects
prompts.text: Compose a scene with three subjects arranged clearly, each with readable pose, expression, and role in the image.

prompts.name: Small Team
prompts.text: Compose a small team scene with coordinated outfits, distinct silhouettes, and shared purpose.

prompts.name: Crowd Background
prompts.text: Add a soft background crowd for atmosphere while keeping the main subject dominant and readable.

prompts.name: Stage Performance Group
prompts.text: Create a stage performance group with coordinated poses, bright lighting, and energetic presentation.

prompts.name: Classroom Group
prompts.text: Create a classroom group setting with students or classmates in the background, keeping detail controlled and non-distracting.

prompts.name: Party Group
prompts.text: Create a friendly party group scene with decorations, varied poses, warm lighting, and lively social atmosphere.

prompts.name: Festival Group
prompts.text: Create a festival group scene with lanterns, stalls, crowd warmth, and clear focus on the subject.

prompts.name: Adventure Party
prompts.text: Create an adventure party with varied fantasy roles, readable gear, and strong group composition.

prompts.name: Cafe Table Group
prompts.text: Create a small group seated at a café table with drinks, natural conversation energy, and cozy detail.

prompts.name: Battle Lineup
prompts.text: Create a non-graphic battle-ready lineup with strong silhouettes, dramatic posture, and clear character roles.

prompts.name: Family Scene
prompts.text: Create a gentle family-style group scene with relaxed warmth, believable spacing, and domestic atmosphere.

prompts.name: Idol Unit
prompts.text: Create an idol unit scene with coordinated costumes, polished stage lighting, and cheerful energy.

prompts.name: Research Team
prompts.text: Create a research team scene in a lab or study setting with tools, notes, and focused collaboration.

prompts.name: Market Crowd
prompts.text: Create a market crowd with environmental figures, stalls, movement, and busy but controlled background detail.
